calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-27-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Maxwell A. Graham, Defendant appearing in Propria Persona
No other appearance.

Ruling:
Tentative Ruling adopted: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2007 Continued To Nov-30-07 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
